project_type: Electron + React + Python desktop app (TeleExport - Telegram chat exporter)
test_command: cd teleexport && npm run test && cd python && python -m pytest tests/
verification_instructions: 1. npm install in teleexport/ root. 2. Verify TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit). 3. Verify Vite builds (npm run build). 4. Verify Python imports work (python -c 'import python'). 5. Run pytest for Python tests.
setup_instructions: 1. pyenv local 3.11.15 for Python. 2. npm install in teleexport/ for Node deps. 3. uv pip install -e ./python or pip install deps for Python.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET mode - full access to npm and pip registries. Python 3.11 available via pyenv. Node 22 available.
contribution_requirements: Follow the technical plan structure from teleexport_technical_plan.md. Use JSON-RPC over stdin/stdout for IPC. Use Tailwind CSS 4 for styling. Use Zustand for state management.
key_patterns: JSON-RPC IPC protocol between Electron main process and Python child_process. React 19 + TypeScript frontend with Zustand stores. Python async with Telethon for Telegram MTProto. Jinja2 templates for HTML export formatting.
directory_structure: teleexport/ - root project dir with package.json, electron-builder.yml, vite.config.ts. teleexport/src/ - React frontend. teleexport/electron/ - Electron main process. teleexport/python/ - Python backend with core/, export/, formatters/, ipc/, utils/ subdirs. teleexport/tests/ - Python and frontend tests.
